issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. The card gains Banish when played (DON!! cost activation), not on an activated ability.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn'. Banish keyword is a permanent ability, not temporary.
Second effect is completely wrong. Card text only describes the Banish keyword effect—there is no triggered trash/play effect. This entire effect should be removed.
